title: Spicy Herbal Date Linguine Stir-fry
description: A spicy herbal date dish perfect for a romantic evening featuring linguine pasta with a Brazilian flair.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the linguine pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
In a pan, heat a little bit of oil over medium-high heat. Add minced garlic and scotch bonnet pepper; sauté for about 1 minute or until fragrant.
Add finely diced onions into the pan with garlic and scotch bonnet, cook for another 2 minutes until translucent.
Pour in crushed tomatoes and low sodium chicken broth; bring to a simmer. Reduce heat to medium-low and let it thicken slightly.
Stir in cooked linguine pasta and gently fold everything together so that it coats all the pasta evenly. Simmer for an additional 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Fold in finely chopped cilantro leaves and green onions just before serving.
